creator: ronald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for your report and thoughts on this.

Users can build mongodb themselves using the port option NOAVX=off.
Enabling the option was done because of actual real world usage of mongodb as dependency of unifi8 which did not work on actually used machines.
I do not want to complicate the port for hypothetical situation users might encounter. The build times of this port are very long so multiple builds are not ideal.

If reports come in of people having actual performance problems because of this option then I'm open for patches.
